intended_use: Ortho AI is an image-processing software indicated to assist in making measurements for a total hip arthroplasty, total knee arthroplasty, and lumbar spine fusion surgery. It is intended to assist in
intended_use_full: Ortho AI is an image-processing software indicated to assist in making measurements for a total hip arthroplasty, total knee arthroplasty, and lumbar spine fusion surgery. It is intended to assist in the measurement of x-ray images by measuring lengths, angles and position of implants relative to the bone structures of interest, provided that the points of interest can be identified from radiology images.
target_condition: Patients undergoing primary hip replacement, primary knee replacement, and lumbar spine fusion surgery
ground_truth: 3 fellowship-trained ABOS board-certified orthopaedic surgeons with >10 years experience each, following a 2+1 truthing process where two blinded surgeons reviewed segmented images and a senior-level surgeon adjudicator reviewed and finalized modifications
other_metrics: Dice coefficient >0.85 for all algorithms and connected domains across all anatomical models; Hip model: LLD measurements within ±1.96mm, Offset within ±0.88mm, SFP angle within ±1.05mm of human measurement; Hip-spine model: SS, SPT, APPt, PI, LL, PI-LL all within 2 degrees of human measurement with no statistical difference; Knee model: LDFA, mPTA, aHKA, aJLOA all within 2 degrees of human measurement with no statistical difference
